recommendations.title: Add Organization Schema
recommendations.detail: No Organization schema found. This is the baseline schema every business site needs — it tells Google who you are.

recommendations.title: Add robots.txt
recommendations.detail: No robots.txt found. Add one to guide crawlers and reference your sitemap.

recommendations.title: Fix Missing Image Alt Text
recommendations.detail: Only 0% of pages have all images tagged with alt text. This hurts accessibility and image SEO.

recommendations.title: Fix Duplicate Page Titles
recommendations.detail: 2 pages share a title with another page. Unique titles are required for SEO.

recommendations.title: Reference Sitemap in robots.txt
recommendations.detail: Add 'Sitemap: https://domain.com/sitemap.xml' to robots.txt so all crawlers find it.

recommendations.title: Add WebSite Schema
recommendations.detail: Add WebSite schema with a SearchAction to enable sitelinks search in Google.

recommendations.title: Add BreadcrumbList Schema
recommendations.detail: Breadcrumb schema on interior pages enables richer search result listings.

recommendations.title: Create a Custom 404 Page
recommendations.detail: The 404 page appears to be missing or minimal. A helpful 404 page with navigation reduces bounce rate.

recommendations.title: Install Google Tag Manager
recommendations.detail: GA4 is present but GTM is not. GTM makes it easier to manage and add tags without developer involvement.

recommendations.title: Install Meta Pixel
recommendations.detail: No Facebook/Meta Pixel detected. Required for retargeting ads and tracking conversions from Meta campaigns.

recommendations.title: Add Security Headers
recommendations.detail: Only 0/5 security headers set. Add Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, and X-Content-Type-Options at minimum.

recommendations.title: Add Calls to Action
recommendations.detail: Only 20% of pages have a clear CTA. Every page should guide users to a next step.

recommendations.title: Expand Thin Content
recommendations.detail: Only 60% of pages have 300+ words. Thin content ranks poorly and doesn't convert.
